title: Cflow Request
description: A Request is a submission within a workflow that moves through stages for review, approval, or rejection.

currentStage.description: Name or identifier of the current process stage.

fields.description: Dynamic key-value pairs representing the form field data for the request.

submittedBy.description: Username of the person who submitted the request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was last updated.
